channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Federal judge reinstates labor board member fired by President Donald Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge ruled Thursday that President Donald Trump acted illegally when he fired a member of an independent labor agency, and the judge ordered that she be allowed to remain on the job. U.S. District Judge Beryl Howell in Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KUNZELMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Politics Friday: Moves in Washington hover over state budget outlook
item.description: Friday at noon, MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst talks to Sen. Mark Johnson about the state’s budget situation. Plus, a conversation with the dean of Minnesota’s congressional delegation, U.S. Rep. Betty McCollum.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: Maine GOP urges Dems to repeal transgender athlete policy following federal Title IX violation finding
item.description: Republican state lawmakers in Maine fear the state will lose hundreds of millions in federal education funding due to recent Title IX violation tied to trans sports participation.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dem senator behind social media fail responds to Elon Musk's offer
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker said he will not be taking up Elon Musk on an offer after the senator took credit for a Democratic social media mashup against President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Warren explains her applause to Trump's 'Pocahontas' jab during his speech to Congress
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren said her resistant applause when President Trump called her “Pocahontas" during his address to Congress was to affirm "American support for Ukrainians.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's trade war draws swift retaliation with new tariffs from Mexico, Canada and China
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump launched a trade war Tuesday against America’s three biggest trading partners, drawing immediate retaliation from Mexico, Canada and China and sending financial markets into a tailspin as the U.S.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, PAUL WISEMAN and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump's 'Golden Dome' will need Manhattan Project-scale whole-of-government effort, Space Force general warns
item.description: The "Golden Dome" missile defense system proposed by President Donald Trump will require a whole-of-government effort to realize, according to a Space Force general.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump’s Middle East envoy confirms direct talks with Hamas
item.description: It’s the first known direct engagement between the U.S. and Hamas since the State Department designated the group a foreign terrorist organization.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Takeaways from AP's report on why so many Greenlanders are Lutheran
item.description: NUUK, Greenland (AP) — About 90% of the 57,000 Greenlanders identify as Inuit and the vast majority of them belong to the Lutheran Church today, more than 300 years after a Danish missionary brought that branch of Christianity to the world’s largest island.
item.dc:creator: LUIS ANDRES HENAO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NYC Council Speaker Adrienne Adams to run for mayor
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York City Council Speaker Adrienne Adams is joining the race for the mayor’s office, she's expected to announce on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Nevada Democrats urge Lombardo to hire fired federal workers
item.description: Democratic leaders in the Nevada Assembly are urging Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo to hire federal workers laid off as part of recent firings from President Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump could reduce Mexico, Canada tariffs, commerce secretary says
item.description: "Maybe — he’ll consider giving them relief until we get to, of course, April 2," the Commerce Secretary told Bloomberg.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Businesses scramble to contain fallout from Trump’s tariffs on Canada, China and Mexico
item.description: A Minnesota farmer worries about the price of fertilizer. A San Diego entrepreneur deals with an unexpected increase in the cost of remodeling a restaurant. A Midwestern sheet metal fabricator bemoans the prospect of higher aluminum prices.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: 6 takeaways from Trump’s pointedly partisan address to Congress
item.description: After a firehose of a first six weeks back in the White House, President Trump delivered a boastful and partisan address to a joint session of Congress Tuesday night. Here are six takeaways from the speech.
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro, MPR News

item.title: Texas Democrats criticize school leaders for being too “nice” about their funding needs
item.description: Lawmakers this week listened to testimony on House Bill 2, which would raise schools’ base funding per student by $220 — a figure that falls short of what many Texans say is needed.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Jaden Edison, KPRC 2

item.title: Ukraine selling T-shirts with Zelensky quote from Trump-Vance meeting
item.description: The Ukrainian government has launched a T-shirt fundraising effort seeking to capitalize on Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky's now-infamous Oval Office meeting on Friday with President Trump and Vice President Vance.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WFLA, NBC
